title: T-013 — Cascade Chain 4: Template → ApplyTemplate to ProdDetail
prompt:
# T-013 — Cascade Chain 4 (Template apply)

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §6.1 Chain 4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
When fa.template changes, look up Reference.Templates row and copy operation_1..4 names into all current prod_detail rows for the FA, then invoke chain2 recompute.

## Implementation contract
New packages/cascade-engine/src/chain4-template.ts. handleTemplateChange(productCode, newTemplate). Reads Reference.Templates row, iterates prod_detail rows, sets manufacturing_operation_1..4 from template fields, then calls chain2 recompute for each row. Single tx. Emits fa.template_applied with affected count.

## Files
- packages/cascade-engine/src/chain4-template.ts [create]
- packages/cascade-engine/__tests__/chain4.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fa with 3 prod_detail rows and Template 'BakeryStandard' (Mix/Knead/Proof/Bake), when handleTemplateChange runs, then all 3 rows have manufacturing_operation_1='Mix' through 4='Bake'
2. Given chain2 recompute is required after template apply, when handler returns, then intermediate_code_p1..4 and intermediate_code_final are recomputed for each row
3. Given non-existent template, when handler runs, then it throws TemplateNotFoundError without mutating any prod_detail row

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests for happy path, downstream chain2 recompute, error path
- Run 'pnpm --filter cascade-engine test chain4'

## Risk red lines
- Do not partially apply (atomic on tx)
- Do not skip chain2 recompute invocation
- Do not break existing prod_detail rows for unrelated FAs

pipeline_inputs.description: Template cascade copies operation names into prod_detail rows and triggers chain2 recompute.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single-tx handler. Reads Reference.Templates, applies operations to all prod_detail rows for FA, invokes chain2 recompute for each.

Given chain2 recompute required after template apply, when handler returns, then intermediate_code_p1..4 and intermediate_code_final recomputed for each row
Given non-existent template, when handler runs, then TemplateNotFoundError thrown without mutating any prod_detail row
